text: Emit and hydrate supervisor state-machine state across all session runtimes
description: Ensure every supported session runtime exposes the current state-engine state (for example EXPLORING, WORKING, WRAPPING_UP, ERROR) on connect and on transition, and ensure the frontend can hydrate that state reliably instead of falling back to generic connection labels.

status.comment: Created from watchdog panel work: UI currently falls back to connection state when runtime state is not emitted or hydrated.
